name_en: ❤️B's exclusive two-tone canvas and leather lock bag, featuring a structured shoulder bag silhouette with a lock decoration inspired by the Thomas Bur exclusive logo. Easily transforms into a crossbody or handbag.
name_cn:
❤️B's exclusive two-tone canvas and leather lock bag, featuring a structured shoulder bag silhouette with a lock decoration inspired by the Thomas Bur exclusive logo. Easily transforms into a crossbody or handbag.
Size: W21 x H16 x D6cm
